settings.title: Welcome Baby

settings.title: Birth Details
settings.description: Name, weight, date and time display

settings.question: Can I add the baby's photo?
settings.answer: Yes. Upload a photo and we'll incorporate it into your chosen design. We accept JPG and PNG files.

settings.question: Can I include birth details?
settings.answer: Yes. Add name, date of birth, time, weight and length to any of our designs.

settings.question: How quickly can I receive it?
settings.answer: Standard turnaround is 2-3 working days. Express next-day options are available for those exciting moments.

settings.question: Is it suitable for outdoor use?
settings.answer: Yes. Our banners are printed on durable PVC and work perfectly as a front-of-house welcome home sign.

settings.heading: Announce your new arrival in style
